About the firm

Built for the transactions traditional institutions cannot execute.

IIRand Capital is a specialist commercial asset finance and capital solutions firm. The firm was established to address a critical gap in the market: the inability of traditional financial institutions to deliver fast, flexible, and commercially intelligent funding for asset heavy businesses.

Beyond asset finance, the firm operates as a multi disciplinary platform across legal advisory, accounting and tax, corporate finance, international FX, and integrated wealth and family office structuring, enabling clients to access, structure, and deploy capital across the full transaction lifecycle.

Unlike conventional lenders constrained by rigid credit frameworks, we combine legal precision, capital markets expertise, and entrepreneurial execution to deliver tailored solutions across machinery, equipment, transport fleets, infrastructure, and cross border trade.

$3B+
Assets placed & monetised through private placement.
$16B
Partnership transactions led across asset classes.
05
Integrated practice areas, one principal desk.
2016
Year established. Sandton, Johannesburg.
Practice areas

Five integrated practice areas, one principal desk.

Each engagement is structured by a single relationship lead with direct access to all five practice areas. Clients receive integrated counsel rather than handoffs between specialists.

Practice IV · International & FX/international-transfer-fx

Cross border capital in motion.

A full service desk for cross border capital, FX structuring, and international payments. Engagements span sovereign and family wealth movements, treasury level execution, and the regulatory architecture that governs international flows out of and into South Africa.

Practice V · Family Office/wealth-structuring-family-office

A flagship private client platform.

Integrated wealth preservation, succession planning, and family governance advisory for principal families, founders, and ultra high net worth clients. The Wealth and Family Office practice is treated as the firm's flagship offering.

Flagship Offering · Family Office

Preserving, structuring, and transmitting private wealth across generations.

For principal families, founders, and ultra high net worth clients, IIRand Capital delivers end to end stewardship: trust and foundation architecture, multi jurisdictional tax and residency planning, fiduciary governance, succession, and the institutional infrastructure that supports continuity over decades, not cycles.

FO / 01
Trusts & Foundations
Architecture for trusts, foundations, family offices, and bespoke corporate holding structures.
FO / 02
Succession & Estate
Estate planning, generational transfer, and continuity frameworks aligned to family values.
FO / 03
Multi Jurisdictional Tax
Residency planning, cross border tax structuring, and treaty optimisation.
FO / 04

Cross border inheritance frameworks compliant with multiple legal regimes.
FO / 05

Asset Protection

Business Continuity

Engagement

How a mandate moves through the firm.

From first inquiry to deployed capital, the process is deliberate, transparent, and built around qualified counterparties. Every mandate begins with confidentiality and ends with a structured outcome.

01
Inquiry & NDA

Qualified counterparties engage the desk. A non disclosure agreement is executed before any sensitive detail is exchanged.

02
Scoping & Diligence

Legal, commercial, and capital review. We assess the asset, the counterparty, and the structure simultaneously.

03
Structure & Terms

Bespoke transaction architecture, not product selection. The terms sheet reflects the specifics of the mandate.

04
Execution & Stewardship

Capital is deployed, contracts are closed, and ongoing stewardship is provided where the mandate extends beyond placement.

Sector coverage

Capital and counsel for the real economy.

The firm specialises in the asset classes that underpin industrial growth, where commercial intelligence, legal precision, and speed of execution matter more than the box checking of credit policy.

Machinery
